name: RPlog_Crestian_s_Condolences
title: Crestian's Condolences
summary: Caspian leader Presav Crestian Tarasar makes a holocall to the Jedi Jessalyn Valios to deliver difficult news before it becomes public: Basca Starker is dead, his body delivered and confirmed against their genetic records. Jessalyn receives the word with resigned grief and pointed coldness toward Crestian, whose past unkindness toward her she has not forgotten. Crestian adds that the body was brought in by Basca's brother, Marius Starker, who claimed a history with Jessalyn and means to seek her out. The revelation that the two were brothers visibly stuns Jessalyn, making sudden sense of past events, and she asks that Crestian pass along that she looks forward to meeting Marius again. The two part with strained civility, acknowledging that Caspar, and perhaps they themselves, can now move forward.
